# Direct Servicing Initiative (DSI)
> Southern California's trusted private loan servicer

## About
Direct Servicing Initiative (DSI) is a family-owned loan servicing company based in West Covina, California, serving the private lending industry across Southern California. DSI provides compliant, transparent, and investor-friendly loan servicing tailored for individual investors, private money investors, investment companies, private money brokers, and hedge funds.

## Services
- Loan Servicing: Loan boarding, ACH payment processing, escrow management, borrower alerts, investor reporting
- Processing & Documentation: Document management, compliance verification, loan file auditing, regulatory filings
- Non-Performing & Distressed Loan Services: Default management, foreclosure coordination, loan modifications, REO disposition

## Leadership
- Frank Williams, Principal

## Service Area
Southern California — including Los Angeles County, San Gabriel Valley, Inland Empire, Orange County, and surrounding regions.

## Key Differentiators
- Family-owned with institutional-grade standards
- Compliance-first culture (TILA, RESPA, state-specific regulations)
- Real-time investor dashboards with 24/7 portal access
- Automated SMS and email borrower payment alerts
- ACH payment processing with 99.8% accuracy
- Transparent fee structures and reporting
